programmes.show_description: A young man moves in with a woman who own a German Shepherd Husky; after being attacked, he moves out. S23, Ep173
A fight over friends with benefits ends with a catfight at a gas station, a six-night prison stay, and menacing, texted photos of guns. S23, Ep174
A young man's gossip about an alleged affair between his boss and a female acquaintance lead to a restraining order. S23, Ep175
A woman claims vulgar, threatening texts, alleged stalking and heavy breathing left her too terrified to show up in court. S23, Ep176
Alex and Maggie Murdaugh lived a lavish lifestyle, at their sprawling country estate in Moselle. In 2011, that dynasty would begin to crumble. S1, Ep2
David Tronnes meets Shanti Cooper online and moves to Orlando, purchasing a house in cash. In 2018, David finds Shanti unresponsive. It is clear this is not an accidental death. S1, Ep3
Investigators turn to satellite surveillance to track down the abductor of a young girl. When they find her, a hidden fingerprint helps solve the case. S6, Ep25
When a state trooper is attacked, investigators uncover a 'signature' that links the assault to the murder of a young woman. S6, Ep26
When a woman vanishes under mysterious circumstances, investigators use cat hairs and insects to track her down. S6, Ep27
When the wife of a successful attorney is found shot in the head, DNA testing on blood spatters helps to solve the case. S6, Ep28
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A persistent investigator finally uncovers the truth in a ten year old case of an elderly couple's murder. S9, Ep14
A street fight that claimed the life of a wrestling champion led to a murder trial. S9, Ep15
Cutting-edge forensic science helps solve real crimes. Devon Guzman's murder was set up to look like suicide, but investigators uncover the shocking truth. S9, Ep16
A man disappears one year after starting an affair with his friend's wife. Fifteen years later, a hobbyist with a metal detector helps police find new evidence. S9, Ep17
The body of a co-ed was found by police who had no idea who would want this girl dead. Her killer was found thanks to a unique fibre on the victim's clothing. S9, Ep18
A go-go dancer tells her family she needs to get away and vanishes for 20 years, but a phone call from out of the blue reveals the real story. S9, Ep19
A man suspected in his girlfriend's murder swears he didn't do it - can his Fitbit prove he's innocent? S30, Ep16
A woman suddenly vanishes and is not reported missing for months - her hairdresser pushes for answers - is she dead or alive? S30, Ep18
An audacious scam cons a group of NHS hospitals out of over twelve and a half million pounds. S1, Ep2
A locksmith scams a London hospital out of nearly half a million pounds. S1, Ep3
Abraham Shakespeare won the lottery in 2006. Dee Dee Moore befriended him, gained control of his assets, and murdered him in 2009. S1, Ep4
When William Saunderson-Smith was found bludgeoned to death in 2011, police discovered cash stuffed in bags and sixty-seven different mobile phones. S1, Ep5
A man accuses his best friend of damaging his car and flirting with his wife while he was in prison. S10, Ep206
A man sues his stepmother for harassment after she demands payback for an alleged car loan. Parents dispute damages after an expensive violin is damaged. S10, Ep207
Feuding ex-fiances dispute the cost of daycare for their toddler. A graduate student is devastated when her Siberian Husky is allegedly `lost' by her pet sitter. S10, Ep208
A woman claims a father of four children threatened to sell her belongings while she was in rehab. S10, Ep209
A teenager claims he was brutally attacked while trying to defend his little brother from a local bully. S10, Ep210
Angry mothers dispute underage drinking and the car accident that ensued after their teenagers got drunk at a party. S10, Ep211
A woman claims her cousin stole her identity and racked up a hefty phone bill. A teenager insists she owes nothing to her ex-roommate. S10, Ep212
A teenager charges an ex-classmate with street racing and wrecking her mum's car. A woman claims her internet boyfriend from Nigeria scammed her and her sister. S10, Ep213
A woman pays thousands for her friend's divorce attorney and demands that she be paid back. A mother claims the cell phone she bought online for her teenager was stolen. S10, Ep214
A property manager vehemently denies having an inappropriate relationship with his ex-wife's attorney when an Ex tenant sues him after being assaulted. S23, Ep180
A woman files an allegedly malicious complaint to the Better Business Bureau when her ice cream renovation does not go as planned. S23, Ep178
The Judge utters one of her most infamous' Judyisms when a marina owner offers up a fishy story about a pontoon boat crash. S23, Ep179
A Judge Judy fan serves 12 days in jail and says he returned home to find an ex-girlfriend had robbed him. S23, Ep177
A woman accuses her estranged daughter-in law of wreaking havoc on their family when she up and leaves the state; Judge Judy asks her to do the right thing. S23, Ep181
An Idaho rodeo takes a walk on the wild side when young, intoxicated campers start punching the daylights out of each other. S23, Ep182
A man knocks on 80 apartment doors to try and find the partygoer who damaged his fiancé's car; the host of the rowdy party refuses to give up a friend. S23, Ep183
The official state cat of Maine is at the centre of a dispute between a tenant and landlord who argue over whether the animal was severely abused or not. S23, Ep184
An ugly fight breaks out when a man doesn't make hot chocolate fast enough for his lover; both are medically treated for bleach exposure. S23, Ep185
A restaurant owner is accused of making a profit by hiring disabled people and then not paying them. S23, Ep186
Abraham Shakespeare won the lottery in 2006. Dee Dee Moore befriended him, gained control of his assets, and murdered him in 2009. S1, Ep4
When William Saunderson-Smith was found bludgeoned to death in 2011, police discovered cash stuffed in bags and sixty-seven different mobile phones. S1, Ep5
When a little girl was run over, her mother took the case into her own hands and used her knowledge of murder mysteries to find the vehicle responsible. S6, Ep29
A mother and daughter vanish whilst out shopping. When the girl turns up dead, the mother is the initial suspect. But who really killed her? S6, Ep30
Lead singer of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In Men', Walter Scott, wrote 'The Cheater' a song that rang true in later life. S7, Ep1
Eight years after the murder of a woman in a Pizza Hut restaurant, a seemingly innocent man confesses to the crime. Was he the real killer? S7, Ep2
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
In January 1989, Mary Hague-Kelly was discovered raped and strangled to death in her home in Texas. In the wake of her murder, it seemed a monster may live close by. S2, Ep6
A study in modern crime solving techniques. It demonstrates how traditional investigative techniques can now be significantly enhanced by the scientific power of DNA profiling.
A woman suddenly vanishes and is not reported missing for months - her hairdresser pushes for answers - is she dead or alive? S30, Ep18
In 1996, a sexual attacker was tracked down and detained, but years later, new forensic science sheds new light on the case. S7, Ep16
Find out how man's best friend helped police track down the killer of a helpless couple. S7, Ep17
A woman falls into a fairytale romance, becomes pregnant and then gets terribly ill. Doctors assure her she's fine, but she's not so certain. S7, Ep18
Faryion Wardrip was a typical, honest citizen on the outside, but a brutal serial killer on the inside. DNA testing proved to be his demise. S7, Ep19
In the UK, a woman is found murdered after a date. Footage of her abandoned car leads the police to her killer. In the US, a woman's remains are found. S2, Ep1
In the US, a dying man calls for help. Police work to crack the case through footage and data. In the UK, a neighbour's security camera holds the key to solving a murder. S2, Ep2
Investigating the disappearance of 6-year-old Etan Patz and the case that haunts the detectives who spent more than three decades trying to find him. S30, Ep19
When an American tourist is killed in a Mexican resort, police on both sides of the border use forensic evidence to uncover a sinister truth. S9, Ep28
In 1988, a banker's wife is kidnapped and the police struggle to break the case until entomology and computer forensics help to reveal a new suspect. S9, Ep29
A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife in their pool. However, the man claims he has no explanation and no recollection of the crime. S9, Ep30
An unfortunate soul is burnt to death when a house bursts into flames, but careful investigation reveals the fire was not an accident. S10, Ep1
When a grandmother is ten minutes late in returning her grandson to his father, all hell breaks loose because they miss their movie at the mall. S23, Ep202
After a high-speed chase, the driver of a getaway car serves time for robbery; the Judge goes after his missing partner in crime. S23, Ep203
When a teenager allegedly has a temper tantrum in the shower, her mother sues her for over 2K in damages. S23, Ep204
A woman discovers in a text message that her husband is loaning money to another woman. S23, Ep205
Parents are nowhere to be found when children start a car and crash into a pond; two kids save themselves by jumping out the window. S23, Ep206
After allegedly being t-boned by a fellow cyclist, a woman claims he was more concerned with his unopened liquor bottle than her wellbeing. S23, Ep207
A man confesses that his dog damaged a neighbour's property but only after clear video surveillance catches him in the act. S23, Ep208
After serving time for domestic violence, a man sues his ex-fiance for an engagement ring, a forged pay cheque and stolen property. S10, Ep232
Divorced parents dispute financial responsibility by their teenager's parking tickets and court fees. A professional arm wrestler is accused of beating up her roommate. S10, Ep233
A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for thousands in medical bills and living expenses, claiming he took advantage of her and her mother. S10, Ep234
After a teenager's college fund is spent to bail her boyfriend out of jail, an angry mother demands that he pay her daughter back. S10, Ep235
A teenager is allegedly humiliated in karate class and an angry mother wants a refund. S10, Ep236
